# My Site
> A comprehensive resource for web development tips and tools.

## Tools
- [Site Analyzer](https://example.com/tools/analyzer): Free website analysis tool
- [SEO Checker](https://example.com/tools/seo): Check your SEO basics

## Blog
- [Getting Started with GEO](https://example.com/blog/geo-intro): A beginner guide to GEO
- [Advanced Schema Markup](https://example.com/blog/schema-guide): Deep dive into JSON-LD
